start.text: You are Evelyn, a Chinese immigrant living in California. You run a small laundromat with your husband Waymond. Your life is a mess - the laundromat is failing, and you're struggling to connect with your daughter Joy, who's been feeling depressed lately. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you receive an unexpected visit from an IRS agent, Deirdre Beaubeirdre. She's here to audit your business, and you can't help but feel like your life is about to get even more complicated.

choices.text: Try to charm the agent with your wit and humor
Get defensive and argue with the agent

node_charm.text: You flash a bright smile and try to disarm the agent with your wit. To your surprise, she seems to relax a bit, and the conversation becomes slightly more pleasant. However, you can't shake off the feeling that she's still hiding something. As you continue to chat, Waymond bursts in, holding a stack of papers. 'Evelyn, we need to talk,' he says, looking worried.

choices.text: Ask Waymond what's going on and what the papers are about
Tell the agent that you need to take care of this and ask if you can reschedule the audit

node_defensive.text: You immediately go on the attack, arguing that the audit is unfair and that you're being targeted. The agent remains calm, but you can sense a hint of annoyance in her voice. 'I'm just doing my job, ma'am,' she says. Waymond tries to intervene, but you wave him off, determined to defend yourself.

choices.text: Continue to argue with the agent, refusing to back down
Take a step back and try to calm down, realizing that you're not getting anywhere

node_waymond.text: Waymond looks at you with a mixture of concern and fear in his eyes. 'Evelyn, I've been trying to talk to you about our marriage... and the laundromat. We need to make some changes, or... or I don't know what will happen.' He trails off, and you feel a pang of worry. What does he mean?

choices.text: Tell Waymond that you're willing to listen and work through your issues together
Get angry and accuse Waymond of not supporting you or the laundromat

node_reschedule.text: The agent agrees to reschedule the audit, but warns you that it won't be a simple process. As you exchange phone numbers and make plans, you notice a strange look on Waymond's face. He seems... different. Almost like he's looking at you from a different perspective.

choices.text: Ask Waymond what's wrong and why he's looking at you like that
Let it slide and focus on getting out of there as quickly as possible

node_argument.text: The argument escalates, with both you and the agent getting more and more agitated. Waymond tries to intervene again, but you're too far gone. Suddenly, the agent pulls out a strange device and presses a button. Everything around you begins to distort and blur.

choices.text: Try to make sense of what's happening and what the device is doing
Get pulled into the distortion, feeling like you're losing control

node_calm_down.text: You take a deep breath and try to calm down, realizing that you're not getting anywhere with the agent. She nods, seeming to appreciate your sudden change in demeanor. 'Let's reschedule for another time, shall we?' she suggests.

choices.text: Agree to reschedule and try to make a good impression
Refuse to reschedule and try to storm out

node_listen.text: You tell Waymond that you're willing to listen and work through your issues together. He looks relieved, and you begin to discuss the problems facing your marriage and the laundromat. As you talk, you start to feel a sense of hope that things might actually get better.

choices.text: Continue the conversation, exploring ways to improve your relationship and the laundromat
Get sidetracked and start to worry about the IRS audit again

node_angry.text: You get angry and accuse Waymond of not supporting you or the laundromat. He looks hurt, and you realize that you've gone too far. The conversation ends abruptly, with both of you feeling frustrated and upset.

choices.text: Try to apologize and make amends
Storm off, feeling angry and hurt

node_waymond_glitch.text: You ask Waymond what's wrong and why he's looking at you like that. He hesitates, and for a moment, you see a flicker of something... else. A different version of him, perhaps? 'Evelyn, I... I think I might be able to help you,' he says, his voice low and urgent.

choices.text: Ask Waymond what he means and how he can help
Tell Waymond that you're not interested and walk away

node_sliding.text: You let it slide and focus on getting out of there as quickly as possible. The agent nods, seeming to accept your sudden change in behavior. As you leave, you can't shake off the feeling that something strange just happened.

choices.text: Go back to the laundromat and try to process what just happened
Meet up with Joy and try to forget about the weird encounter

node_glitch.text: You try to make sense of what's happening and what the device is doing. The agent explains that it's a... a 'verse-jumper.' 'It allows us to access different versions of ourselves from parallel universes,' she says, her voice matter-of-fact.

choices.text: Ask the agent to explain more about the multiverse and verse-jumping
Refuse to believe her and try to get back to reality

node_pulled_in.text: You get pulled into the distortion, feeling like you're losing control. Everything around you becomes a blur, and you're aware of multiple versions of yourself, all existing in different realities.

choices.text: Try to navigate the multiverse and find a way back home
Get overwhelmed and lose yourself in the infinite possibilities

node_reschedule_success.text: The agent agrees to reschedule the audit, and you exchange phone numbers and make plans. As you leave, you feel a sense of relief wash over you.

choices.text: Go back to the laundromat and try to focus on your business
Meet up with Joy and try to reconnect

node_storm_out.text: You refuse to reschedule and try to storm out. The agent calls after you, but you don't look back. As you walk away, you feel a sense of frustration and anger.

choices.text: Go back to the laundromat and try to calm down
Meet up with Joy and try to vent about your bad day

node_laundromat_success.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to focus on your business. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of relief wash over you.

choices.text: Try to keep things normal and focus on your work
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_meet_joy_success.text: You meet up with Joy and try to reconnect. She seems happy to see you, and you start to feel a sense of hope that things might actually get better.

choices.text: Ask Joy about her girlfriend Becky and try to be supportive
Get sidetracked and start to worry about your relationship with Waymond

node_laundromat_storm.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to calm down. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of frustration and anger.

choices.text: Try to focus on your work and push aside your thoughts
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_meet_joy_storm.text: You meet up with Joy and try to vent about your bad day. She listens, seeming to understand your frustration.

choices.text: Ask Joy about her girlfriend Becky and try to be supportive
Get sidetracked and start to worry about your relationship with Waymond

node_conversation_continues.text: You continue the conversation, exploring ways to improve your relationship and the laundromat. As you talk, you start to feel a sense of hope that things might actually get better.

choices.text: Make a plan to implement changes and work together
Get sidetracked and start to worry about the IRS audit again

node_worry_audit.text: You get sidetracked and start to worry about the IRS audit again. Waymond tries to reassure you, but you're too anxious to listen.

choices.text: Try to focus on the conversation and push aside your worries
Get defensive and accuse Waymond of not understanding your concerns

node_apologize.text: You try to apologize and make amends. Waymond looks surprised, but then nods, seeming to accept your apology.

choices.text: Continue the conversation, trying to move forward
Get emotional and start to cry

node_storm_off.text: You storm off, feeling angry and hurt. Waymond calls after you, but you don't look back.

choices.text: Go back to the laundromat and try to calm down
Meet up with Joy and try to vent about your bad day

node_waymond_help.text: Waymond explains that he's a version of himself from a parallel universe, one where things turned out differently. You listen, trying to wrap your head around the concept.

choices.text: Ask Waymond to explain more about his situation and how he can help
Refuse to believe him and try to walk away

node_walk_away.text: You tell Waymond that you're not interested and walk away. He calls after you, but you don't look back.

choices.text: Go back to the laundromat and try to focus on your business
Meet up with Joy and try to forget about the weird encounter

node_laundromat.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to process what just happened. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you can't shake off the feeling that your life is about to get a lot more complicated.

choices.text: Try to focus on your work and push aside your thoughts
Get distracted and start to worry about the multiverse and verse-jumping

node_meet_joy.text: You meet up with Joy and try to forget about the weird encounter. She seems happy to see you, and you start to feel a sense of hope that things might actually get better.

choices.text: Ask Joy about her girlfriend Becky and try to be supportive
Get sidetracked and start to worry about your relationship with Waymond

node_multiverse.text: The agent explains that the multiverse is a vast expanse of parallel universes, each with their own version of reality. You listen, trying to wrap your head around the concept.

choices.text: Ask the agent to explain more about the implications of the multiverse
Get overwhelmed and try to shut down

node_refuse.text: You refuse to believe her and try to get back to reality. The agent shrugs, seeming to expect your reaction. 'Suit yourself,' she says. 'But you're about to find out that the multiverse is very real.'

choices.text: Try to walk away and ignore the agent's warning
Get pulled into the distortion again, feeling like you're losing control

node_navigate.text: You try to navigate the multiverse and find a way back home. It's disorienting, but you're determined to find a way back to your own reality.

choices.text: Keep navigating, trying to find a familiar reality
Get lost and start to panic

node_overwhelmed.text: You get overwhelmed and lose yourself in the infinite possibilities. It's exhilarating and terrifying at the same time.

choices.text: Try to find a way back to reality, feeling overwhelmed
Give in to the possibilities and see where they take you

node_laundromat_success.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to focus on your business. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of relief wash over you.

choices.text: Try to keep things normal and focus on your work
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_laundromat_storm_off.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to calm down. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of frustration and anger.

choices.text: Try to focus on your work and push aside your thoughts
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_meet_joy_storm_off.text: You meet up with Joy and try to vent about your bad day. She listens, seeming to understand your frustration.

choices.text: Ask Joy about her girlfriend Becky and try to be supportive
Get sidetracked and start to worry about your relationship with Waymond

node_laundromat_walk_away.text: You go back to the laundromat and try to focus on your business. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of frustration and anger.

choices.text: Try to focus on your work and push aside your thoughts
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_meet_joy_walk_away.text: You meet up with Joy and try to forget about the weird encounter. She seems happy to see you, and you start to feel a sense of hope that things might actually get better.

choices.text: Ask Joy about her girlfriend Becky and try to be supportive
Get sidetracked and start to worry about your relationship with Waymond

node_normal.text: You try to keep things normal and focus on your work. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of relief wash over you.

choices.text: Continue to focus on your work and try to keep things normal
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_normal_again.text: You continue to focus on your work and try to keep things normal. As you sort through a pile of dirty laundry, you feel a sense of relief wash over you.

choices.text: Continue on with your day
Get distracted and start to worry about the audit again

node_end.text: Congratulations, you have reached the end of the story.

vocabulary.multiverse: a hypothetical set of all universes, each with its own version of reality
vocabulary.verse-jumping: the act of moving between parallel universes
vocabulary.laundromat: a business that provides washing and drying machines for people to clean their clothes
vocabulary.audit: an official inspection of a business or person's financial records
vocabulary.distortion: a change in the shape or appearance of something
vocabulary.glitch: a small technical problem or fault in a system or machine
vocabulary.sidetracked: distracted or diverted from a main topic or goal
vocabulary.defensive: protective or justifying of one's actions or behavior
vocabulary.frustration: a feeling of anger or disappointment
vocabulary.hurt: feeling or showing pain or sadness
vocabulary.amends: changes made to improve a situation or relationship
vocabulary.compose: to put together or arrange in a particular order
vocabulary.vent: to express or release a strong emotion
vocabulary.sidetrack: to distract or divert someone or something
vocabulary.implications: the possible effects or consequences of a particular action or situation
